fields.title: Critical bKash liquidity shortage
fields.explanation: The projected bKash balance is expected to fall below the configured safety threshold.
fields.recommended_action: Add provider liquidity immediately and review recent cash-out activity.

fields.title: Unusual transaction velocity detected
fields.explanation: Several high-value cash-out transactions were recorded in a short period.
fields.recommended_action: Review the flagged transactions and contact the agent.

fields.title: Repeated transaction amount pattern
fields.explanation: Multiple transactions with similar amounts were detected.
fields.recommended_action: Verify whether the transactions represent genuine activity.

fields.title: Test alert
fields.explanation: Projected balance may fall below safety threshold

fields.title: Cash dangerously low at Banani Supermarket
fields.explanation: Physical cash balance has dropped below 50% of the safety threshold. The agent may be unable to serve cash-out requests.
fields.recommended_action: Dispatch emergency cash replenishment. Contact the area supervisor immediately.

fields.title: Cash below safety threshold at Halishahar Mini Mart
fields.explanation: The agent's physical cash is below the configured safety threshold, indicating potential service disruption.
fields.recommended_action: Schedule a cash replenishment within the next 4 hours.

fields.title: Unusual transaction velocity detected at Dhanmondi Mart
fields.explanation: Transaction frequency is 3.2x above the 7-day rolling average for this time window. This may indicate structuring or smurfing activity.
fields.recommended_action: Review recent transaction log. If pattern persists, escalate to compliance.

fields.title: Moderate velocity spike at Daulatpur Digital Hub
fields.explanation: Transaction rate is 1.8x the expected baseline. Pattern is within monitoring thresholds but warrants observation.
fields.recommended_action: Monitor for the next 2 hours. No immediate action required.

fields.title: Repeated identical amounts at Mirpur DOHS Booth
